contentfulBlogPost.seoDescription: Easy ReportPortal onboarding — explore features, integrate automated tests, defect triage, and visualize real-time QA trends.
contentfulBlogPost.author: ReportPortal Team

articleBody.raw:
{"nodeType":"document","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"ReportPortal is an open-source test automation dashboard designed to collect, analyze, and visualize results from your automated test runs in real time.","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"It helps QA and DevOps teams focus on what really matters — identifying failures, tracking defects, and improving test stability over time. Getting started with ReportPortal is simple and flexible. Whether you’re experimenting with the demo environment or setting up your own environment, this guide will help you get from installation to actionable insights in just a few steps.","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"heading-2","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"1. Getting started with demo and own environment","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"heading-3","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"1.1. Begin with Demo environment","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"The quickest way to explore ReportPortal requires no setup — just use the ","marks":[],"data":{}},{"nodeType":"hyperlink","data":{"uri":"https://demo.reportportal.io/ui/"},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Demo Instance","marks":[{"type":"underline"}],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"text","value":". Review Test Results","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Open the ","marks":[],"data":{}},{"nodeType":"hyperlink","data":{"uri":"https://reportportal.io/docs/work-with-reports/ViewLaunches"},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Launches tab","marks":[{"type":"underline"}],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"text","value":" to see all test runs. Each launch entry includes its start time, duration, and the number of Total, Passed, Failed, and Skipped tests.","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Click a launch name to open its hierarchy: ","marks":[],"data":{}},{"nodeType":"text","value":"Suite -> Test -> Step -> Log","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"data":{}},{"nodeType":"text","value":". You can navigate by clicking on names or status counts to filter specific results.","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Within the ","marks":[],"data":{}},{"nodeType":"text","value":"Log view","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"data":{}},{"nodeType":"text","value":", you’ll find detailed logs and attachments for each test.","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"As you review your test results and inspect logs, you’ll likely notice some failed or unstable cases. That’s where ","marks":[],"data":{}},{"nodeType":"hyperlink","data":{"uri":"https://reportportal.io/blog/defect-triage-with-reportportal"},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"defect triage","marks":[{"type":"underline"},{"type":"bold"}],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"text","value":" comes in — the next step of the process, where you analyze the root cause of each failure and classify it properly. For any failed item, you can assign an appropriate defect type:","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"unordered-list","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"list-item","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"To Investigate","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"data":{}},{"nodeType":"text","value":" – not yet reviewed ","marks":[],"data":{}}]}]},{"nodeType":"list-item","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Product Bug","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"data":{}},{"nodeType":"text","value":" – issue in the application ","marks":[],"data":{}}]}]},{"nodeType":"list-item","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Automation Bug","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"data":{}},{"nodeType":"text","value":" – problem in the test or data ","marks":[],"data":{}}]}]},{"nodeType":"list-item","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"System Issue","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"data":{}},{"nodeType":"text","value":" – environment failure ","marks":[],"data":{}}]}]},{"nodeType":"list-item","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"No Defect","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"data":{}},{"nodeType":"text","value":" – false alarm or expected outcome","marks":[],"data":{}}]}]}]},{"nodeType":"heading-2","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"4. Visualize Test Data","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"After reviewing and triaging your test results, it’s time to turn data into insights.","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"ReportPortal provides rich ","marks":[],"data":{}},{"nodeType":"hyperlink","data":{"uri":"https://reportportal.io/blog/test-results-visualization"},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"visualizations","marks":[{"type":"underline"}],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"text","value":" to help you track testing trends and quality metrics in real time. ","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"embedded-asset-block","data":{"target":{"sys":{"id":"XaQUoBu3TdLYg4zWLVD5Y","type":"Link","linkType":"Asset"}}},"content":[]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"","marks":[],"data":{}}]}]}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Once you save the changes, the demo dashboard will automatically refresh, and all widgets will display metrics based on your actual test runs.","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"embedded-asset-block","data":{"target":{"sys":{"id":"12RasBa925uxMbdGYLhSOA","type":"Link","linkType":"Asset"}}},"content":[]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"This quick start guide has shown how easily you can begin working with ReportPortal — from exploring the demo environment to deploying your own instance, integrating it with your test framework, reviewing results, and visualizing ","marks":[],"data":{}},{"nodeType":"hyperlink","data":{"uri":"https://reportportal.io/docs/dashboards-and-widgets/ReportingAndMetricsInReportPortal#qa-and-test-automation-metrics-in-reportportal"},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"key metrics","marks":[{"type":"underline"}],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"text","value":". With just a few steps, you can turn raw test execution data into clear, actionable information about product quality and test stability. Whether you’re running small regression suites or managing large-scale CI pipelines, ReportPortal helps you centralize results, speed up failure analysis, and make data-driven decisions for continuous improvement in testing.","marks":[],"data":{}}]}]}
